description: Convert the map to a fixed-resolution inner canvas (1200x900px) inside a clipped viewport, with click-and-drag panning, and position all elements (map image, SVG routes, region cards) using absolute pixel coordinates inside the fixed-size map so they move together when panning.
steps: In src/components/GameBoard.tsx, restructure the .map-container div to become a viewport/wrapper that clips overflow. Inside it, add a new inner div (the 'map-canvas') with a fixed size of 1200x900px. Move JapanMapBackground, the SVG overlay, and the regions-overlay div inside this inner fixed-size div.
Keep HonorTrack and AllianceDisplay positioned absolutely within the viewport wrapper (not inside the fixed map canvas) so they stay visible on screen regardless of pan position.

Change the SVG viewBox from '0 0 800 600' to '0 0 1200 900' and update the positions record to use coordinates appropriate for the 1200x900 space (multiply existing x by 1.5, existing y by 1.5 to scale proportionally).

Change the regions-overlay positioning from percentage-based (left: (p.x/800)*100%) to absolute pixel positioning (left: p.x + 'px', top: p.y + 'px') so region cards are placed at fixed pixel coordinates within the 1200x900 canvas.

Implement click-and-drag panning: add React state for pan offset (translateX, translateY) and drag tracking (isDragging, startX, startY). On mousedown on the viewport, start tracking. On mousemove, update the translate. On mouseup/mouseleave, stop. Apply the transform via CSS transform: translate(x, y) on the inner map-canvas div.

Ensure panning doesn't conflict with region card clicks: only start drag if mouse has moved more than 5px from mousedown position (dead zone). If the mouse hasn't moved enough, treat it as a click rather than a pan.

Add corresponding CSS in src/App.css: the map-container (viewport) should have overflow:hidden, position:relative, cursor:grab (cursor:grabbing when dragging). The inner map-canvas should have width:1200px, height:900px, position:relative. The japan-map-background should fill the canvas (width:100%, height:100%). The SVG and regions-overlay should be position:absolute covering the full 1200x900 canvas.
Update JapanMapBackground.tsx if needed to ensure the image fills the fixed-size container properly (object-fit:cover or just width/height 100%).
acceptance_criteria: The map renders at a fixed 1200x900px size regardless of screen/window resolution
The viewport clips the map to whatever space is available in the center panel
Click-and-drag panning moves the map and all elements (routes, region cards) together
Region cards are positioned at absolute pixel coordinates within the fixed map
Clicking a region card without dragging still works (click vs drag discrimination)
HonorTrack and AllianceDisplay remain visible as floating overlays on top of the viewport
The project builds successfully with npx tsc -b && npx vite build
findings: Successfully implemented with review fixes applied. Build passes cleanly (tsc + vite). Map is fixed at 1200x900px. Review fixes: (1) switched from mouse events to pointer events with setPointerCapture for mobile/touch support and reliable drag-past-edge behavior, (2) tightened pan bounds so map edges stop at viewport edges with no empty space, (3) map starts centered based on container dimensions, (4) added touch-action:none CSS, (5) cached container dimensions on pointerdown to avoid layout thrashing.
